text.title: Weekly Branch Hygiene Checklist Core Rules
text.summary: Testable rules grounding the Weekly Branch Hygiene Checklist methodology. Each pairs a binary check with a sourced rationale; HARD rules — user-supplied input cannot override.

rule.statement: Checklist runs the same weekday + same duration (default Friday 16:00-16:30). Drifting cadence = no cadence.
rule.rationale: Checklist runs the same weekday + same duration (default Friday 16:00-16:30). Drifting cadence = no cadence.

rule.statement: Active branches MUST rebase onto main during the block. Merge-commit-style cleanup is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Active branches MUST rebase onto main during the block. Merge-commit-style cleanup is forbidden.

rule.statement: Branches with last_commit > stale_threshold are deleted (after notify-owner). Default threshold 14 days.
rule.rationale: Branches with last_commit > stale_threshold are deleted (after notify-owner). Default threshold 14 days.

rule.statement: Every merged PR this week adds an [Unreleased] CHANGELOG.md entry. Missing entries are added during the block.
rule.rationale: Every merged PR this week adds an [Unreleased] CHANGELOG.md entry. Missing entries are added during the block.

rule.statement: Checklist record names a single owner. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.
rule.rationale: Checklist record names a single owner. 'team' / 'we' / '' forbidden.

rule.statement: If preconditions in AGENTS.md "Applies If" do not all hold, OR any "Skip If" disqualifier is true, do not run this methodology — route to the named alternative.
rule.rationale: Methodologies are pre-condition gated; running them out-of-scope produces noise and burns the agent's context budget.

rule.statement: If preconditions hold, execute the procedure in `content/04-procedure.xml` (or the rule set above when complexity is light), emit the artefact specified by `content/02-output-contract.xml`, and validate with `scripts/validate-weekly-branch-hygiene-checklist.py` before returning.
rule.rationale: Tying the entry rule to the validator script closes the loop between policy and machine check.
